Title: Decades ago, a Maryland sailor burned his winter socks. Now it's a spring tradition
Description:
In Annapolis, Md., people gather each year to usher in the warmer weather by burning their socks.
The springtime tradition is the unofficial start of the Chesapeake Bay sailing season.

Title: A $50 billion fund to help rural hospitals could actually lead to closures and cuts
